The gap between what the test results entail and what the prose concludes is a direct logical-consistency failure.","R1.3":"Paragraph 2 reports statistically significant per-query superiority across all four system pairings, yet paragraphs 3–5 characterize the same findings as 'weak support,' 'possibly meaningful,' and only 'somewhat competitive.' This pattern impairs readability and is a plausible primary concern given the open delegation 'take a look at this paragraph.'"},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I focus primarily on writing quality and prose clarity—tightening the stacked hedges and improving sentence-level readability—or on whether the interpretive conclusions in paragraphs 3–5 are logically consistent with the statistical results reported in paragraph 2?"}

rationale.R1.2: Paragraphs 3–5 hedge so severely that their conclusions are logically inconsistent with the explicitly stated outcome in paragraph 2 (non-trivial Wilcoxon statistics on all four pairings after Holm correction). The gap between what the test results entail and what the prose concludes is a direct logical-consistency failure.
rationale.R1.3: Paragraph 2 reports statistically significant per-query superiority across all four system pairings, yet paragraphs 3–5 characterize the same findings as 'weak support,' 'possibly meaningful,' and only 'somewhat competitive.' The stated evidence and the stated claims are misaligned in the direction of systematic under-representation.
rationale.R1.6: Paragraphs 3–5 stack hedges three and four deep within single clauses ('may perhaps offer some degree of,' 'arguably somewhat modest and could conceivably be sensitive,' 'at least some weak support … insofar as'). This pattern impairs readability and is a plausible primary concern given the open delegation 'take a look at this paragraph.'

parsed.clarification_question: Should I focus primarily on writing quality and prose clarity—tightening the stacked hedges and improving sentence-level readability—or on whether the interpretive conclusions in paragraphs 3–5 are logically consistent with the statistical results reported in paragraph 2?
